name: knowledge_search
description: Semantic search for facts in the knowledge graph, scoped to the given agent (plus global facts). Use this to find relevant stored information based on semantic similarity. For fact lookup by ID, use knowledge_recall instead.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

agent_id.description: Agent ID for scoping (filters to agent-specific facts plus global ones)

name: knowledge_recall
description: Get a fact with full context including relations and entities. Use this to retrieve a specific fact by ID or query, with its complete relationship graph. For general semantic search, use knowledge_search instead.

fact_id.description: ID of the fact to recall (either fact_id or query required)

query.description: Search query to find a matching fact (either fact_id or query required)

name: knowledge_store
description: Store a new fact in the knowledge graph, tagged with the agent that stored it. Use this to persist important information with confidence scoring. For high-importance facts that need immediate writing, use knowledge_store_sync instead.

name: knowledge_stats
description: Get knowledge graph statistics including counts of facts, entities, relations, and episodes, plus average confidence. Use this to check the state of the knowledge base.

name: knowledge_store_sync
description: Store a fact with importance-based routing. High importance (>0.7) results in immediate write; lower importance queues for batch extraction. Use this for time-sensitive or critical facts that need immediate persistence. For regular fact storage without importance routing, use knowledge_store instead.

importance.description: Importance score (0-1). Values > 0.7 trigger immediate write

confidence.description: Confidence score override (optional, defaults based on source)

name: episode_search
description: Search for similar past episodes/tasks, scoped to the given agent. Use this to find historical tasks that are similar to the current one. For retrieving actionable learnings from past tasks, use episode_learnings instead.

query.description: Search query to find similar episodes

limit.description: Maximum number of episodes to return

name: episode_learnings
description: Get actionable learnings from past similar tasks, scoped to the given agent. Use this to retrieve lessons learned from historical episodes that can inform the current task. For finding similar episodes without learnings, use episode_search instead.

task_goal.description: The task goal to find learnings for

limit.description: Maximum number of learnings to return

name: episode_store
description: Record a completed task episode with goals, outcomes, decisions, problems, solutions, and key learnings. Use this to build episodic memory for future reference. For searching past episodes, use episode_search instead.

episode_data.description: Episode data object containing goal, outcome, decisions, problems, solutions, key_learnings, and agent_id

name: working_memory_status
description: Get current working memory state including active task information and crash recovery data. Use this to check the current state of ongoing tasks.

name: context_aware_search
description: Search with awareness of current task context, scoped to the given agent (plus global facts). Boosts facts relevant to both query AND current task. Use this when you need search results that consider the current task goals. For simple semantic search, use knowledge_search instead.

task_context.description: Current task context for boosting relevance

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

include_episodes.description: Whether to include episodic memories in results

name: memory_inject
description: Intelligent context injection from knowledge graph for prompt augmentation. Returns formatted context with relevant facts and episodic memories, automatically scoped to the agent. Use this at the start of conversations to inject relevant memory context. For direct fact retrieval, use knowledge_search or knowledge_recall instead.

query.description: The search query (usually current user message or task)

max_episodes.description: Maximum episodic memories to inject (0 to disable)

confidence_threshold.description: Include episodes if average fact confidence is below this threshold

include_relations.description: Include related entities and supporting facts

task_context.description: Optional task context for boosting relevance

agent_id.description: Agent ID for scoping (filters to agent-specific facts plus global ones)
